pricing_conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.
falsifiers: Credit losses or mark-to-market force book below the low case.
Fee load or internalization cost proves larger than the low case.
Realized losses or failed redeployment push economic equity below the low case.
Dividend cut and DE permanently below coverage invalidate income-capitalization cross-checks.

power_zone.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
